prompt: Create a cinematic ultra-detailed fantasy nature landscape at sunrise: a tranquil misty lotus pond with a single tall blue-gray heron standing in the shallow reflective water at the center, its full reflection visible beneath it. The scene is framed by a large ancient weeping cherry tree on the left with dark twisting branches and countless hanging pale pink blossoms, while a dense forest of pine and flowering trees rises around the lake in the background. The low golden sun glows just above the treeline slightly right of center, casting warm orange rays, peach sky light, soft haze, and shimmering reflections across the water. In the foreground, show exactly 9 prominent lotus elements: 6 open pink lotus flowers and 3 closed pink lotus buds, surrounded by broad green lily pads; place the largest open lotus on the lower right, another large open lotus near the lower center-left, two open flowers on the left side, and smaller open flowers farther back on the right. Add a small traditional lakeside pavilion or gazebo on the far right bank, partially softened by mist. Use soft pink lotus petals, blue-gray heron, golden sunrise, and a serene magical atmosphere. Style: photorealistic digital painting, high dynamic range, soft volumetric fog, delicate bloom, warm pastel palette, crisp foreground details, dreamy distant depth, wide 16:9 composition. No people, no text, no watermark, no buildings except the small pavilion.
